findings.description: Source has 2 h2 headings (「Nablarchの知的財産権」and「Nablarchの利用制限」) but the knowledge file maps both into a single section (s1). Per validation rules, h2 heading count should be compared with knowledge section count.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2s: 「Nablarchの知的財産権 / ====」and「Nablarchの利用制限 / ====」. Knowledge file: only s1 covering both.
